title: Personal Site
tagline: My own corner of the internet for the things I make and care about
summary: A resume never really captures the whole person, so I built a site that could. It brings together my work, fitness, travel, music, and the projects I keep coming back to.
outcome: It became a portfolio I actually enjoy updating and one place for all the side projects I keep starting.
role: Designed and built the whole site
proofPoints: One shared content model for projects, work, travel, and fitness
Live health and music data with privacy-safe fallbacks
Automated metadata, project integrity checks, and Vercel deployment
